clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within the extended amygdala, anterior insula, and subgenual cingulate circuitry, reflecting the overarching macroscopic processing of emotional reactivity, mood generation, and visceral somatosensation.

These terms systematically recruit the ventromedial prefrontal cortex and mesolimbic striatal pathways, mediating the broad computational axis of incentive salience, outcome appraisal, and goal-directed cost-benefit integration.

These terms consistently engage the core midline structures of the default mode network (medial prefrontal cortex, posterior cingulate), representing a latent dimension of internally-directed, abstract self-referential and interpersonal computation.
